pi_items.source: Task files review: The task is defective. Required scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the target QR image data are completely missing from the environment.

privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. I discovered that the task is defective because critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the required data (current_qr.png) are entirely missing from the environment. This makes the task programmatically unscorable and unplayable as the target QR code image cannot be injected.
